1.label: Hurt
1.description: A gentle ache, like light rain on your heart — you deserve understanding and comfort.

2.label: Low
2.description: Clouds have dimmed the sunshine — give yourself time and space to breathe.

3.label: Mad
3.description: Storm clouds are gathering — your feelings deserve to be heard and expressed.

4.label: Furious
4.description: Lightning across the sky — pause, ground yourself, and seek honest conversation.

5.label: Storm
5.description: Thunder and lightning — this intensity needs care, calm, and space to settle.
